description: C-code block for custom continuous dynamics (4 continuous states)
name: CBLOCK4
anomalies: exprs contains ScilabList with nested ScilabString + ScilabDouble
Uses list() syntax in exprs[10] and exprs[13]
Empty realParameters/integerParameters but accepts matrix expressions like [1,1]
criticalRules: Special list() syntax for empty Scilab lists
Matrix expressions like [1,1] stored as strings
19 configuration parameters for advanced C blocks
